title: AI Researcher Truth Stack
summary: AI researchers investigate how machine learning systems learn, generalise, reason, and fail, then turn those insights into working systems.
starterPack: Start with arXiv, DeepMind, and Anthropic research.
Read Stuart Russell and Melanie Mitchell for perspective.
Use the AI Index and The Batch for field context.

tiers.title: First Principles
tiers.description: The research habits that matter most in AI.

items.description: Building a model is not the same as using it.

items.name: Evaluation discipline matters
items.description: Performance must be measured on real tasks and failure modes.
